nasb.text: just as they were handed down to us by those who from the beginning were eyewitnesses and servants of the word,

esv.text: just as those who from the beginning were eyewitnesses and ministers of the word have delivered them to us,

cnv.text: 按照起初親眼看見的傳道人所傳給我們的，編著成書；

csbs.text: 就是照着从起初以来的目击者和做福音仆人的那些人所传给我们的，
